summary: Full backend + frontend regression of the monetization feature set. Backend: 14/14 pytest pass in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration8_monetization.py covering every checklist item from the review request — SA + photographer login (correct role), SA credit-pack list/create/update/delete, photographer-side list (active only, all 3 seeded packs), create-order (returns rzp_test_ key OR placeholder 502), verify with bogus signature -> 400 'Invalid payment signature', purchase history GET, photographer detail drill-down returning {admin (no password_hash), summary, profiles, credit_ledger, purchases}, 401 unauth on admin endpoint, 403 for photographer token on SA endpoints, razorpay-webhook accepts empty body (placeholder secret), /api/invite/<slug> emits Cache-Control: public, max-age=30, s-maxage=60 at the FastAPI layer, bot-detection bypass on /api/invite (curl/8.0.1 UA NOT blocked). Frontend: SA /super-admin/login -> /super-admin/dashboard renders 'Sovereign command' + credit-packs-btn + view-detail-<id>; credit-packs-btn -> /super-admin/credit-packs renders 3 gold-bordered cards (Starter ₹500/50, Studio ₹1000/120 'MOST POPULAR', Atelier ₹2500/350) with EDIT/DELETE + 'Add a New Pack'; Details -> /super-admin/photographers/<id> renders Demo Photographer header + admin@wedding.com + 6 stat tiles (Invitations, Published, RSVPs, Views, Credits Left, Revenue) + 3 tabs (Invitations(0), Credit ledger(0), Purchases(1)); Photographer /admin/login -> dashboard -> top-up renders /admin/credits/top-up with 3 PAY-₹ gold buttons + balance card (Available, Total Ever Added, Used) + Recent Purchases table.

minor.issue: Response envelope is {packs: [...]} rather than a raw array (and purchases is {purchases: [...]}). Not a bug per se but the iteration_7 test file assumed a raw array — frontend pages handle both via .packs accessor, so end-user is unaffected. Documenting for next agent.

With placeholder Razorpay keys this returns 502 'Authentication failed' from Razorpay (expected). Once real test keys are configured the route returns 200 with razorpay_key_id starting with rzp_test_. Test accepts 200/502/503.

Signature-verified path NOT exercised end-to-end (RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET is 'PLACEHOLDER_*' so code takes the unverified branch). Code-review only — recommend a separate e2e once a real webhook secret is set.

Cloudflare/Kubernetes ingress overrides FastAPI Cache-Control with 'no-store' on the public URL. Verified header is correctly set at localhost:8001. Infra/ingress configuration action item — not code.

issues: Balance card label is 'Total Ever Added' instead of the spec's shorter 'Total' — purely cosmetic; the metric is correct.
Tab label is 'Credit ledger' (lowercase l) while spec used 'Credit Ledger'. Cosmetic only.

action_items: (Infra) Configure ingress/CDN to honor origin Cache-Control on /api/public/* and /api/uploads/* (currently overridden to no-store) so the preventive caching in security_middleware.py:62-73 takes effect at the edge.
(Recommend) Add per-admin rate-limit on /api/admin/credits/purchase/create-order — currently a stolen token could spawn unlimited Razorpay orders.

(Recommend) monetization_features.py webhook handler returns 200 even when credit-add fails (line ~343). Razorpay retries on non-2xx; returning 500 on credit failure would allow Razorpay to re-deliver.
(Recommend) photographer_detail does N+1 count_documents per profile (~4 queries/profile). Fine at current scale; switch to $facet aggregation once a photographer's profile count exceeds ~50.
(Recommend) Revenue summed in Python from first 100 purchases only (limit(100)). A photographer with >100 purchases will under-report revenue. Move to server-side aggregation.
critical_code_review_comments: All monetization endpoints correctly exclude MongoDB _id from responses — verified by test assertions.
Atomic credit pattern (update_one with {credited:{$ne:true}} + check modified_count) is the correct idempotency primitive. Good.
razorpay webhook HMAC computed on RAW request bytes before json.loads — correct per Razorpay spec.
SA endpoints properly enforce require_super_admin; photographer token -> 403 confirmed via test.
monetization_features.py is 443 lines (under 700-line guideline). _strip + _now_iso helpers are duplicated from other feature modules — extract to a shared util.
Bot-detection whitelist correctly skips /api/invite, /api/public, /api/uploads/, /api/ws/, /api/rsvp, /api/payments/razorpay-webhook — verified via curl UA test.
Cache-Control header correctly set on /api/invite/* GETs (max-age=30, s-maxage=60, public) — verified at FastAPI layer.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (4/4 flows: SA login+dashboard, SA credit-packs page, SA photographer-detail page, photographer top-up page)

test_credentials: Super admin: superadmin@wedding.com / SuperAdmin@123 ; Photographer: admin@wedding.com / admin123 ; Razorpay test keys in /app/backend/.env (rzp_test_Spuhaq4p1yWumY / vIMPwLwrHItJQmj1wFvD233u, webhook secret PLACEHOLDER). DB_NAME=wedding_db (NOT wedding_platform — iteration_7 test file had wrong db name which caused 9 false failures on re-run).
seed_data_creation: All test-created data is TEST_<uuid> prefixed and cleaned up by each test's try/finally. The CRUD test creates one credit_pack and deletes it. The verify-invalid-signature test inserts one credit_purchases stub doc and removes it. Zero residue after run — verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) Use DB_NAME=wedding_db (the older iteration_7 test file used wedding_platform which doesn't exist anymore — that caused 9 false failures when I re-ran it). 2) Always inject Mozilla User-Agent header on requests to /api/admin/* and /api/super-admin/* — the BotDetectionMiddleware blocks default python-requests UA with 403 'Automated access not allowed'. /api/invite/* is whitelisted and accepts curl/bot UAs intentionally. 3) Cache-Control assertions MUST hit http://localhost:8001 directly — Cloudflare strips the origin header on the public preview URL. 4) Razorpay create-order returns 502 with the current placeholder keys — accept 200/502/503 in tests. 5) API response shape: list endpoints return {packs: [...]} or {purchases: [...]} envelopes, not raw arrays. 6) SA-detail click on photographer row uses [data-testid='view-detail-<admin_id>'] — auth must be valid via login flow; calling page.goto('/super-admin/dashboard') from another page can lose context, so login-and-click in a single session.
rca_of_the_issue: The previous iteration_7 test file (/app/backend/tests/test_monetization_credits.py) was run as a sanity check first and produced 9 failures, ALL traced to: (a) DB_NAME = 'wedding_platform' in that file — the real DB is 'wedding_db' (per backend/.env), so the test couldn't find admins/profiles/credit_purchases it tried to seed/query, and (b) stale TEST_PROFILE_ID / TEST_PROFILE_SLUG referenced live_gallery/wishes/analytics endpoints that returned 404 because the profile no longer exists. These are STALE TEST DATA issues, not product regressions. A fresh focused test file (test_iteration8_monetization.py) targeting exactly the review-request checklist passes 14/14. No code changes were needed in the product; only test-side fixes.
